text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This is so hard! Have either of you had to
make an apron in your home ec class?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I haven't yet. We've only done
cooking practice so far…

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! An apron? Us wielders of magic have
our own clothes that are so much better.
Who needs an apron?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ah, how unfortunate. I was hoping one of you
could help me decide on a design.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Even if it's only an apron, any garb for a
princess to wear must have a truly elegant
design… Ohhh, what to do?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, then how about adding some lace to it?
That'd be so cute. And some frills on the hem,
maybe!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That sounds great! But, you know, it
probably shouldn't be too puffy or anything.
It'll be used for cooking, after all.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh — I know! I should add some sparkly weights that look like jewels! They will add elegance and help me train — two birds, one stone!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What? But wouldn't that ruin the frills…?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should add holsters for some
knives and a pot lid, too. You never know
what might happen in the kitchen!
